name: geolearn-japan
description: GeoLearn Japan — Geotechnical & Geophysical Engineering Platform by MYO NAING TUN / MYO_Geo_Orgs

scripts.build:cf: node secure-build.js && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp _headers dist/ && cp _redirects dist/ && cp -r content dist/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r flashcards dist/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r study dist/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r languages dist/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r vocabulary dist/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r assets dist/ 2>/dev/null; echo 'Cloudflare Pages dist/ ready'
scripts.test: npm run security-check && npm run verify-hashes

author: MYO NAING TUN <MYO_Geo_Orgs>
